name: proyecto-nuevo
description: Monorepo: React apps/web + Laravel backend/api. Desarrollo conjunto: npm run dev

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n web,api -c cyan,magenta "npm run web:dev" "npm run dev:api"
scripts.public:sync: npm run web:build && composer -d backend/api run sync-frontend
scripts.deploy:hosting: npm run web:build && npx firebase deploy --only hosting
